Speakers.Speaker: The Kirijo Group and the Nanjo Group

Dialog.name: DIC_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Kirijo Group was formed after separating from the Nanjo Group. The family motto, "Two in harmony surpasses one in perfection," was passed down to the Kirijo Group back then, as well.[n]{f 1 1}
